title: images: don't list unnamed images twice
body: The "images" command was erroneously listing images that don't have names twice, once with no name, and a second time with "<none>" as a placeholder.  Fixes #279.

Looks like things are timing out?
@jlebon Any ideas why this keeps timing out?
Hmm not sure, maybe another instance of https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1475460? Try adding `--net=host` in  the docker invocation in `.papr.yml`.
@nalind Do you have to rebase to get the --net=host fix?

That's the beauty of [homu](https://github.com/servo/homu): when running the merge test, it will always first rebase the commits onto the target branch (master) so that what is tested is literally the same commit object as what is subsequently pushed to master.

Looking at https://homu-projectatomic-ci-infra.e8ca.engint.openshiftapps.com/queue/buildah, it doesn't look like the new commit has been re-approved.
@rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan d3cd4a8
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
